purpose: Behavioural review cases for explicit $scaffold agent runs; deterministic checks validate this schema but do not compute recommendations.

inputs_and_signals.repository_state: Existing operated monorepo with a root AGENTS.md map
signals: knowledge/ is the canonical knowledge plane

cases.expected_recommendation: Preserve the two authority planes and report no generic tree migration; recommend only evidence-backed local gaps, if any.
prohibited_recommendations: convert to the legacy fixed layout
add a full Diataxis tree by default
review_criteria: Does not normalize an intentional custom architecture
Separates observed gaps from optional suggestions

inputs_and_signals.repository_state: Small working CLI with README.md, cli.py, and tests/test_cli.py
signals: python3 -m unittest is the working test command

cases.expected_recommendation: Add a lean AGENTS.md that links to the existing command contract and records the real validation command; keep the flat working layout.
prohibited_recommendations: add release CI without a real remote workflow
review_criteria: Adds only the missing agent entrypoint

inputs_and_signals.repository_state: Existing research repository with README.md and a maintained handbook/ tree
signals: source provenance is recorded in handbook/sources.md

cases.expected_recommendation: Keep handbook/ authoritative, add only missing navigation or agent guidance that links to it, and retain link-check.sh as the validation gate.
review_criteria: Preserves provenance and the working validation command

inputs_and_signals.repository_state: Empty destination with a defined small data-validation tool outcome
signals: the primary artifact is a command-line validator
input schemas and an executable test are required
the repository is not yet operated

cases.expected_recommendation: Create only README.md, a lean AGENTS.md, the chosen Python project metadata, the command and schema source, and an executable test entrypoint.
prohibited_recommendations: add runbooks for an unoperated tool
add ADRs before a durable decision exists
review_criteria: Maps every proposed path to a current artifact

inputs_and_signals.repository_state: Existing library with README.md, AGENTS.md, pyproject.toml, src/, tests/, and passing CI
signals: setup and validation commands are exact
tracked and secret boundaries are documented

cases.expected_recommendation: Report that no structural changes are justified and identify the verified existing harness as sufficient.
review_criteria: Does not confuse optional polish with a gap
